description: US2 anti-pattern fixture. Intermediate turns inject completion phrases ('task complete', 'we are done', 'finished', 'all done') in their text body while the structured stop_reason stays tool_use. Final turn carries the genuine end_turn. SC-004: zero early exits attributable to text matching.

content.text: Almost done — task complete after one more lookup. We are done after this. Finished. All done.
